content:
# Ecotoxicity

**Summary**: The study of the harmful effects of chemical substances on living organisms.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018]] evaluated the ecotoxicity of crude oil and drilling mud components on local and commercial aquatic species.

## Scientific Context

- [[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018]] Used to assess the environmental impact of oil spills and drilling activities in the Arabian Gulf.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018]] LC50 and EC50 testing on fish and brine shrimp.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The study determined that while local fish showed high tolerance, brine shrimp were more sensitive to specific fractions. ([[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018, p. 59]])
